serviceNotes.engine oil: Mfr row: current-generation E-Class diesels continue Mercedes ASSYST PLUS EU maintenance with flexible oil and filter limits (25,000 km / 12 months commonly quoted for OM654M family in EU press and dealer maintenance summaries). Rec row: 15,000 km for severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz W214 European maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Engine air filter at ASSYST inspection intervals.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month brake fluid change per Mercedes-Benz European E-Class maintenance guidance (consistent with W213 documentation pattern).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter typically near 60,000 km on current four- and six-cylinder diesel schedules—confirm ASSYST for your VIN.
serviceNotes.coolant: Long-life engine coolant renewal per Mercedes high-mileage interval.
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 9G-TRONIC preventive fluid service near 60,000 km despite lifetime classification.
serviceNotes.transfer case oil: 4MATIC models only. Preventive transfer case fluid near 60,000 km.
serviceNotes.rear axle differential oil: AWD preventive axle oil near 60,000 km.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: Accessory drive belt near 100,000 km on belt-driven ancillaries.
